notes: Removed transcription artifacts only: bracketed stage directions ([gelächter], [musik]), HTML entity residue ([ __ ],  ), and collapsed whitespace. Kept friend/co-host dialogue in his own vlogs per spec. Reaction-clip audio could not be reliably separated from his commentary without speaker labels, so was kept — these videos are primarily his narration intercut with his friends' speech in his own videos.
